title: Java String Joining Methods Flowchart
description: A flowchart comparing the different methods for joining strings in Java, from basic concatenation to the modern StringJoiner and String.join() approaches.
relationships: Basic method with performance overhead for many operations
Efficient mutable sequence for single-threaded environments
Thread-safe version of StringBuilder for multi-threaded contexts
Static method for joining CharSequence elements with a delimiter
Class for constructing a sequence of characters separated by a delimiter with prefix and suffix support
